item.title: Thoughts on Scope Creep
item.description: Dealing effectively with scope creep is essential in project management, particularly within the nuanced landscape of software engineering. When not managed adeptly, scope creep can significantly disrupt the team’s momentum, adding complexity and creating bottlenecks that hinder the delivery lifecycle. However, a fundamental tenet of agile software management is to embrace evolving requirements, even at advanced stages of development, leveraging change for the customer’s competitive advantage. Balancing this agility with disciplined scope management, however, requires a nuanced approach.
